summary: Tested 4 new CakApp features (Admin credentials change, Admin-login back button, CakKost flow, CakRent flow). Backend: 27/27 pytest pass (15 legacy + 12 new covering /api/kost, /api/rent w/ type filter, admin CRUD for kost & rent + 401 unauth, /api/admin/credentials validation+change+restore, and orders for cakkost/cakrent returning wa.me URL). Frontend: 12/12 Playwright assertions pass: admin-login-back navigates to /, CakKost lists 3 kost & booking modal computes 2 × Rp 850.000 = Rp 1.700.000 then submits successfully, CakRent mobil/motor tabs filter correctly, +Sopir option toggles and total = price_with_driver × days (Rp 550.000 × 3 = Rp 1.650.000), admin Kost & Rent CRUD via UI works (create -> grid -> delete), Admin Settings credentials card validates confirm-mismatch & <4-char password and accepts happy-path. Admin login still works as admin/admin after all tests (credentials properly restored). All TEST_ seed data cleaned up via API.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 676 lines - approaching the 700-line guideline. As new modules (kost, rent, cakcar, caksend) keep accreting, consider extracting routers (e.g. routes/kost.py, routes/rent.py) for maintainability.

Admin password still stored as plaintext in MongoDB admin_creds collection (now persisted, was previously in-memory only). For an internal MVP this is acceptable, but a hash (bcrypt) should be used for any non-MVP usage.

Auth tokens remain in an in-memory set (_active_tokens). Restarting the backend will invalidate sessions and break the admin until re-login. After a credentials change, any tokens issued under the OLD password remain valid (no revocation) - low risk for MVP but worth a TODO.

Backend KostCreate.price_month and RentCreate.price_day accept Optional[float] = 0; no validation that price > 0 or that allow_with_driver=True implies price_with_driver > 0. Currently UI does not enforce either, so admin could create a vehicle with 0 driver price.

/api/orders accepts service='cakkost' / 'cakrent' with arbitrary details dict - no schema validation for kost_id / rent_id existence or move_in date format. Not blocking, but a server-side sanity check would prevent stale references.
test_credentials: Admin: username=admin, password=admin (restored at end of all tests; verified via login).
seed_data_creation: No new persistent seed. All TEST_ items created during tests (TEST_Kost_*, TEST_Avanza, TEST_Beat, TEST_UIKost, TEST_UICar) were deleted via API at teardown. Verified admin/admin/kost and /admin/rent contain only original seed (3 kost + 4 rent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression tests are split: /app/backend/tests/test_cakapp.py (legacy) + /app/backend/tests/test_cakapp_new_features.py (new kost/rent/creds/orders). Frontend testids confirmed: AdminKost form uses kf-name, kf-addr, kf-fac, kf-desc, kf-price, kf-img, kf-save. AdminRent form uses rf-name, rf-type, rf-desc, rf-price, rf-price-driver (conditional), rf-driver-toggle, rf-img-pick, rf-img, rf-save. CakKost: kost-{id}, kost-name, kost-phone, kost-date, kost-months, kost-notes, kost-total, kost-book-btn. CakRent: rent-{id}, rent-tab-mobil, rent-tab-motor, rent-opt-self, rent-opt-driver (only when allow_with_driver), rent-name, rent-phone, rent-date, rent-days, rent-total, rent-book-btn. AdminLogin back button: admin-login-back. AdminSettings credentials: admin-creds-card, creds-current, creds-new-username, creds-new-password, creds-confirm, creds-save. The change-credentials test resets back to admin/admin even if intermediate steps fail (finally block + safety net). On any rare failure mid-test, run: POST /api/admin/login with username=admin2 password=admin (or admin2) then PUT /api/admin/credentials to restore admin/admin.
rca of the issue: No issues found - all features work as specified.
